name: security-review
description: AI-powered security review for code changes via the /security-review:security-review slash command (namespaced form required — see README, the bare /security-review conflicts with a Claude Code built-in). Two scan modes (diff / --full), multi-ecosystem framework rule packs, multi-platform CI/CD rule pack, MAESTRO 7-layer agentic-AI classification, RCI critique loop, baseline suppression, and surgical-fix patches. Loosely based on anthropics/claude-code-security-review.
